# Distribution Files

Place `vox-codex-v1.zip` here.

This directory is served by GitHub Pages. The download link on the
audiobook-download page points to `dist/vox-codex-v1.zip`.

**IMPORTANT:** GitHub Pages has a 100MB file size limit per file.
If the zip exceeds this, you'll need to use GitHub Releases instead
and update the download link accordingly.
